company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to help content creators automatically edit, enhance, and publish videos across platforms like YouTube and Instagram.

refund.policy: No refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase.
refund.details: Users may cancel their subscription at any time. Refunds are only available within the first 7 days of a new subscription or plan upgrade.

support.basic_plan: Standard email support with 48-hour response time.
support.pro_plan: 24/7 live support via chat and email with 1-hour response time.
support.note: 24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan.

trial.details: All new users get a 7-day free trial of the Pro plan. No credit card required.

cancellation.policy: Cancel anytime. Your subscription remains active until the end of the billing cycle.

features_overview.ai_captions: Automatically generate and sync captions in 30+ languages using our AI engine.
features_overview.auto_editing: AI detects the best cuts, transitions, and moments to keep your audience engaged.
features_overview.templates: 50+ professional video templates for YouTube intros, Instagram reels, and more.
features_overview.collaboration: Pro plan users can invite up to 3 team members to collaborate on projects.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook. Pro plan users get one-click publishing to all platforms.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! All new users get a 7-day free trial of the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for upload. Exports are in MP4 (H.264 or H.265).
